title: Payment Methods - Adding and managing payment methods (incl. payment menus)
workflow_title: Adding and managing payment methods (incl. payment menus)

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to add and manage payment methods, including payment menus.
Go to Payment, then Payment method, and click + Add payment method in the top right corner.
Fill in the name of the payment method.
Add the store configuration: choose the cash drawer and whether to show the amount dialogue box.
Click Save, and Save again, to add the payment method.
To add it to the cashier screen, go to Payment, then Payment menus, click Payment methods, and drag the new method in.
To adjust a method, click the pencil icon, make changes, and Save; to delete, click the trash icon and confirm.
Open the General menu (General then General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
